author: audit-agent

patch.value: The events.jsonl queue file grows unbounded if the remote endpoint is unreachable. retention_days should be used to prune stale entries and cap disk usage.
Implement local telemetry queue retention_days TTL cleanup
retention_days exists in telemetry settings but no cleanup logic prunes old queue entries or events from disk.
Stale queue entries older than retention_days are pruned during flush cycles.

message: Found during 2026-04-26 dogfood audit - retention not enforced
